# ParaWrite

> Canonical URL: https://parawrite.udaradev.me/
> Last Updated: 2026-04-03
> Contact: mailto:hello@udaradev.me

ParaWrite is a web-based manual paraphrasing tool for sentence-by-sentence rewriting.

## Key capabilities
- Upload TXT, DOCX, DOC, and PDF files.
- Split text into editable sentences while preserving context.
- Edit sentence-by-sentence with progress tracking.
- Export output as TXT, DOCX, or Markdown.

## Important limitations
- ParaWrite does not automatically rewrite full documents without user edits.
- PDF extraction quality depends on source document structure.
- Local browser storage may be used for session continuity.

- Home: https://parawrite.udaradev.me/
